title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
blurb2:
In Hodgson's original version of the book, she had a sweet little girl slowly driven sour and sickly by a pestering red-winged blackbird — those delightful critters that love to swoop and not ever shut the hell up when I'm trying to edit these visual novels.
But eventually she flipped the plot around, and the rest is history.
